---
title: "Japan Trip: Visual Itinerary"
author: "DJG"
date: 10/10/25
format:
  html:
    theme: lux
    toc: true
---

Heidi Parks [site](https://www.heidiparkes.com/japan-wmqfa-2025 "Website for tour members") for tour members.

Wisconsin Quilt Museum original [website](https://www.wiquiltmuseum.com/products/japan-trip-nov-2025-heidi-parkes "Original Website").

<iframe src="japan-schedule.html" width="100%" height="3000px" style="border:none;">

</iframe>
